_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Establish, implement and maintains organization-wide policies and procedures to comply with privacy regulations.
reference_document_element_description: Establish, communicate, and enforce enterprise-wide data and AI policies covering quality, privacy, security, ethics, and responsible use.
comments: DCWF task equal WIDAI SP domain. SP-T-005 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RC-T-002 (RC, cosine: 0.617), SP-K-002 (SP, cosine: 0.593).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.5/10 (raw 0.651). Shared vocabulary: [establish, policies, privacy, wide]. DCWF-only terms [comply, implement, maintains, organization, procedures, regulations] vs WIDAI-only terms [ai, communicate, covering, data, enforce, enterprise] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.901 (P=0.917, R=0.886). P exceeds R by 0.032 — the DCWF element's 13 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 17 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Establish, implement and maintains organization-wide policies and procedures to" and "Establish, communicate, and enforce enterprise-wide data and AI policies coverin" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.663 ≈ STS 0.651 (gap 0.012). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [establish, policies, privacy, wide] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 20.8%. Shared tokens: [establish, policies, privacy, wide]. DCWF-only: [comply, implement, maintains, organization, procedures, regulations]. WIDAI-only: [ai, communicate, covering, data, enforce, enterprise].
